overall.description: Cinematic racing game footage from a first-person perspective inside a Nissan vehicle navigating a heavy rainstorm in a covered racing circuit or tunnel. The clip features realistic water effects on the windshield, active wipers, and interaction with other race cars under artificial lighting.

white barrier with red markings visible alongside the white race car

segments.scene_description: The clip opens from the driver's seat of a Nissan vehicle positioned alongside a white race car in a covered racing tunnel. Heavy rain streams down the windshield while artificial lights illuminate the concrete barriers ahead. The rearview mirror is visible as the vehicle moves forward through the enclosed track section.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior cockpit view of Nissan vehicle in rainy tunnel

windshield wipers activate sweeping across the glass to clear heavy rain accumulation

three circular white-faced instrument gauges showing speed and RPM behind the steering wheel
small rectangular screen on the left side of the dashboard showing vehicle information
black wiper blades moving across the rain-covered windshield

segments.scene_description: The view shifts to center on the Nissan steering wheel and dashboard as the vehicle accelerates through the tunnel. Windshield wipers sweep rhythmically to combat the heavy rain while the concrete barriers now appear centered ahead. The interior cockpit details including the instrument cluster and digital display are clearly visible.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues racing through the rain-soaked tunnel with the Nissan dashboard and active wipers framing the view. A black race car appears on the right side, driving parallel to the ego vehicle. The concrete barriers and overhead lights persist as the car maintains high speed through the enclosed circuit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from the driver's seat of a Nissan as it races through a rain-drenched covered circuit. It begins positioned alongside a white race car, with heavy rain streaming across the windshield and artificial lights reflecting off the concrete barriers of the tunnel. As the vehicle accelerates, the camera shifts focus toward the steering wheel and digital dashboard, where windshield wipers sweep rhythmically against the downpour. The scene then maintains this high-speed forward momentum through the enclosed track, framing the cockpit interior against the blur of overhead lights. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a black race car pulling up on the right, driving parallel to the vehicle as they surge together through the rain-soaked tunnel.
